scripts.lint: node -e "const { readdirSync, statSync } = require('node:fs'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const roots = ['public', 'test']; const files = []; const walk = (dir) => { for (const name of readdirSync(dir)) { const fullPath = join(dir, name); const stats = statSync(fullPath); if (stats.isDirectory()) walk(fullPath); else if (fullPath.endsWith('.js')) files.push(fullPath); } }; roots.forEach(walk); for (const file of files) { const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--check', file], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); }"
